name: Stuffed Pumpkins with Herbs & Bread Crumbs
recipeIngredient: 4 miniature pumpkins (about 4 to 5 inches in diameter)
2 cups bread, cubed (rye or whole wheat)
1 tablespoon olive oil or apple juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Cut off the pumpkin tops and set aside for covers.
3. Scoop out seeds and membranes; save for another use.
4. Place pumpkin shells on a large baking sheet.
5. In a medium bowl, combine remaining ingredients and mix well.
6. Pack the mixture tightly into pumpkin cavities.
7. Cover with the tops.
8. Bake for 45 minutes, or until pumpkin shells are tender.
9. Serve hot. Serves 4.
- Per serving: 159 calories; 4g protein; 2g fat; 30g carbohydrates; 0 cholesterol; 209mg sodium; 6g fiber.
